input.background: We have established that the body weights of 20-29-year-old U.S. males have σ=40 pounds.
input.question: What size sample is needed to cut the margin down to 1 pound?

output.method: 达到指定概率所需的最小样本量

sigma.description: The standard deviation of body weights for 20-29-year-old U.S. males, measured in pounds.

margin_of_error.description: The desired margin of error for the sample mean, measured in pounds.
